networkError: Network error: Could not send message
sessionOrAuthError: Session or authentication token not available. Please check your widget configuration.
networkErrorConnect: Network error: Could not connect to API
viewUncertaintyLog: View Customer Support AI Agent uncertainty log
uncertaintyResponsesHint: Customer Support AI Agent has indicated uncertainty in some responses
appDescription: Customer Support AI Agent chat widget for your website
easyIntegrationDesc: Add to any website with a simple script tag
customizableDesc: Match your brand with full styling control
multilanguageDesc: Support for 9 languages out of the box
noMessagesDesc: Start a conversation to see messages here
offlineBannerTitle: You're offline — messages will be queued
offlineBannerDesc: Messages are stored locally and will be sent when connection is restored.
gettingStartedSubtitle: Add the chat widget to your website in 3 steps
gettingStartedPrerequisitesDesc: Before you begin, you'll need the following from your dashboard:
gettingStartedCredentialAgentIdDesc: — the ID of the agent you want to embed
gettingStartedCredentialConfigIdDesc: — the widget configuration ID from the Customize page
gettingStartedStep1Desc: In the dashboard, go to {customize}, select your widget config, and copy its Widget ID.
gettingStartedStep2Desc: Choose your framework and paste the snippet into your app, replacing {key} with your Widget ID.
gettingStartedStep3Desc: The widget will appear on your page. It respects the position, colors, and behavior you configured in the dashboard.
gettingStartedStep4Desc: The docs widget works the same way — load the script and call {openCall} to open it programmatically. Try it live:
widgetConfigMissingParams: Missing required parameters. Please ensure your widget script includes:
uncertaintyLogSubtitle: Messages where the agent indicated uncertainty:
handoffError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
handoffConfirmation: Your message has been sent. Our team will be in touch.
sessionExpiredBody: We've started a fresh session so you can keep chatting.
docsSubtitleFallback: How can we help you today?
docsInitialGreeting: Hello! I'm your documentation agent. How can I help you today?
agentTyping: Customer Support AI Agent is typing
serverError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
agentUnavailable: Unable to access this agent. Please check your configuration.
configUnavailable: Unable to load widget configuration. Please check your settings.
streamInterrupted: Response was interrupted. Please try again.
messageSendTimeout: Message timed out. Please try again.

rateLimitWait.one: Too many messages. Please wait {count} second before trying again.
rateLimitWait.other: Too many messages. Please wait {count} seconds before trying again.

rateLimitGeneric: Too many messages. Please wait a moment before trying again.
sessionRateLimitGeneric: The widget is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
invalidServerResponse: Received an invalid response. Please try again.
whatWouldYouLikeToKnow: What would you like to know?
